label: Correlation Heatmap
description: Asset correlation matrix heatmap with colour-coded cells, tooltip, and dynamic import for performance.

0.6.note: sub-component (CorrelationHeatmap) renders Skeleton rows during isLoading.

0.7.note: sub-component renders 'No correlation data available' when empty.

0.8.note: — sub-component now checks isError from useCorrelationMatrix and renders error message.

0.9.note: no dead code. Architecture note: widget uses Next.js dynamic import delegating to components/risk/correlation-heatmap.tsx which owns its own useCorrelationMatrix hook — L0 checks satisfied at sub-component level.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary via widget-wrapper. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 ✓ no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ no lib/mocks import. 0.6 ✓ sub-component (CorrelationHeatmap) renders Skeleton rows during isLoading. 0.7 ✓ sub-component renders 'No correlation data available' when empty. 0.8 FIXED — sub-component now checks isError from useCorrelationMatrix and renders error message. 0.9 ✓ no dead code. Architecture note: widget uses Next.js dynamic import delegating to components/risk/correlation-heatmap.tsx which owns its own useCorrelationMatrix hook — L0 checks satisfied at sub-component level.

1.1.note: CorrelationHeatmap sub-component reads exclusively from useCorrelationMatrix() API hook.

1.3.note: scope.mode fed into query key and API path (withMode helper).

1.4.note: — correlation matrix is portfolio-level, no client-level cascade in this hook.

1.5.note: — no strategy-level filter for correlation matrix.

1.6.note: no filter selection means full matrix returned.

1.7.note: no reference data constants in this widget or sub-component.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ CorrelationHeatmap sub-component reads exclusively from useCorrelationMatrix() API hook. 1.2 ✓ useCorrelationMatrix calls useGlobalScope() internally (hooks/api/use-risk.ts line 175). 1.3 ✓ scope.mode fed into query key and API path (withMode helper). 1.4 N/A — correlation matrix is portfolio-level, no client-level cascade in this hook. 1.5 N/A — no strategy-level filter for correlation matrix. 1.6 ✓ no filter selection means full matrix returned. 1.7 ✓ no reference data constants in this widget or sub-component.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ (recalculated on price updates), paper ✓, batch ✓. Read-only heatmap.

3.2.note: CorrelationHeatmap child component manages its own data; risk-data-context not used in wrapper. Mode handling deferred to inner component.

3.5.note: Paper mode: same correlation matrix if price history available.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget wrapper. Handled in DynamicCorrelationHeatmap inner component.

l3.notes: Human must verify 3.4 (batch indicator visible in layout). Inner component correlation data source not audited in this pass.

4.1.note: Widget wrapper has no interactive elements. Inner CorrelationHeatmap handles its own interactions.

l4.notes: Human must verify 4.8 (heatmap renders within overflow-auto container without layout break).

5.1.note: Target strategies: all cross-asset strategies where correlation matters (defi-basis-trade, cefi-stat-arb, multi-asset portfolios). Widget is strategy-agnostic correlation matrix.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex colors in wrapper. Inner CorrelationHeatmap component not in scope of this audit (separate file).

7.3.note: 27 lines — minimal wrapper. Inner component separately auditable.

7.4.note: RiskCorrelationHeatmapWidget PascalCase. DynamicCorrelationHeatmap PascalCase. File kebab-case.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function in wrapper.

l7.notes: L7 pass for wrapper. Inner CorrelationHeatmap requires separate audit.

8.1.note: No text-[Npx] in wrapper. Skeleton items use h-6.

8.2.note: No bracket spacing violations. space-y-1.5 and p-2 are scale tokens.

8.3.note: Uses Skeleton from components/ui/skeleton. Dynamic import via next/dynamic.

8.4.note: Agent: wrapper is fully accessible (no interactive elements). Inner CorrelationHeatmap a11y requires separate audit.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=4, minH=3 required. Heatmap must scroll/scale within overflow-auto container.

l8.notes: 8.1-8.3 pass. 8.4/8.5 partially deferred to inner component + human review.

keepSeparate.rationale: Self-contained dynamic-import heatmap; no equivalent widget.

relationships.notes: Uses next/dynamic with ssr:false for client-side only rendering of heavy correlation matrix.

dataContract.notes: Inner CorrelationHeatmap component manages its own data fetching. Audit of inner component data contract deferred.

gaps: Inner CorrelationHeatmap data source and asset universe not audited in this pass
coverage.notes: Self-contained correlation matrix. Asset universe determined by inner component.

findings.description: 0.8 fix: components/risk/correlation-heatmap.tsx now reads isError from useCorrelationMatrix and renders 'Failed to load correlation data' error state
risk-correlation-heatmap-widget.tsx — no user-visible strings in wrapper (all in inner CorrelationHeatmap component)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
